subject: Mankey, a pig-monkey Pokemon with shaggy white fur, raising a fist on a rocky mountain ledge
description: A shaggy white pig-monkey creature crouches aggressively on a rocky ledge, one fist raised in a fighting stance. Its flat pink snout and small tusks are visible, and its expression is angry and combative. The background shows a mountainous rocky landscape with some green vegetation on the slopes and a hazy blue-gray sky. The art style is energetic, with the creature's fur rendered in loose, dynamic strokes suggesting motion and aggression. An Ichigeki (Single Strike) battle style badge is visible in the upper right of the card art frame.
foreground: shaggy pig-monkey creature on rocky ledge with fist raised
background: rocky mountain terrain, green vegetation patches, pale blue-gray sky
emotion: furious and aggressive, fist raised in combat stance
